data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for version-safe updates to plugin-managed dictionaries.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for version-safe updates to plugin-managed dictionaries, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations related to this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and configuration process but do not address the versioning or management of plugin dictionaries, leading to an inconclusive result. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of validation for version-safe updates to plugin-managed dictionaries.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
